source_template.file_name: cot IMPO XXX en Paraguay 3 pets.xls
source_template.relative_path: PARAGUAY/cot IMPO XXX en Paraguay 3 pets.xls

descriptions.title: Customs Clearance. ASU airport.
paragraphs: Includes our charges, our customs agent's charges and SENACSA' fees.
It does not include the Paraguay's Customs´ import tax for the animal´s import.
If clearance is outside normal working hours from M-F from 8:00 to 17:00 hrs. USD1400 extra fees will apply.

descriptions.title: Import taxes Paraguay
paragraphs: Paraguay taxes the import of pet animals with a fix amount.

descriptions.title: Home Delivery
paragraphs: LATAM Pet Transport will deliver 3 pets to owner`s residence within city limits
Quoted in normal working hours from Monday to Friday from 9:00 to 17:00 hs

notes.title: Comments
paragraphs: 1 -This price does not include cost of insurance of the animal.
2 -Prices charged by third parties may vary, in which case we will inform if there are any variation in the customer's charges.
3 - Payment: 100% in advance, 15 days prior to shipment.
